comments: Information of tracklisting from Hal C F Astell's website.
First broadcast of a session by Rock War winners China White, who won their final on 24 November 1989.
The Rock War features Predator from Birmingham, High Treason from St. Ives and Sweet Sin from Manchester. Sweet Sin won, with High Treason second and Predator third.
Interview with Fish, who was in Rome on a promotional tour.

Date confirmed by the Rock War. Tommy mentions at the beginning that this is Round 2 Week 1, which means 02 February 1990. That's backed up by Sweet Sin being on the final three weeks later on 23 February 1990.

sessions.details: one and only. Recorded: 1990-01-05. No known commercial release.

track_listing.track: Commercial proudly proclaiming that Radio 1 is commercial free
